info.label: Secret
info.value: Fields with "secret": true are masked while typing, kept out of ~/.menuki/input_history, and shown as *** in echoed commands.

info.label: Safety
info.value: Every value is shell-quoted, so $( ), backticks, ;, && and | are treated as literal text - never executed.

items.name: Log in with a token
items.description: The token is a secret: masked in the TUI, never stored, shown as *** in the echoed command.

items.name: Set a database password
items.description: Secret with a non-secret host beside it - only the password is masked.

items.name: Injection is neutralized
items.description: Type $(id) or `whoami` here - it is echoed literally, not executed.
